idea-plugin.name: Add Python SDK
idea-plugin.description: Adds "Add Python SDK" items to the Project View context menu. On virtualenv folders (.venv, venv, .virtual_env, .virtualenv) it registers the interpreter inside the folder. On module folders that contain a pyproject.toml it offers "Add Python SDK | From Poetry", which runs "poetry env info --path" and uses the active Poetry virtualenv. In both cases the interpreter is registered as a Python SDK and assigned to the containing module.

action.description: Register this virtualenv as a Python SDK and assign it to the module
Resolve the active Poetry environment (poetry env info) and assign it to the module
